analysis_commentary: Early-kill at 33:35 on H4: legalMass=0.0020 (<0.005) AND top1Legal=0.00 AND elapsed>30min — classic forward-pass-on-illegals signature. 6 arenas, 0 promotions, all draws (~0.87-0.91 draw rate). Critically, this run was NOT replicating 20260501-104322's trajectory: 104322 had legalMass=0.533 by minute 10 (via candidate_tests probes), this run was at legalMass=0.002 at minute 33. The promoted-baseline parameters appear seed-fragile — same params produced a record run AND a stuck-uniform run. Treating as regressed and bailing rather than burning 90 more minutes.
